title: AircraftCollectionMinimalResponse
description: Response envelope for the multiple aircraft endpoint.

ac.description: List of aircraft with all available information.

msg.description: Message indicating the status of the request overall.

now.description: Unix timestamp of the current UTC time on the server (ms).

total.description: The number of aircraft in the response.

ctime.description: Unix timestamp (ms) of when the underlying data was last updated.

ptime.description: Time taken on server to process the request (ms).
